heading: Regional training program on drug abuse in public housing
label: 11923 Regional training program on drug abuse in public housing

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a regional training program for the training of public housing officials, to better prepare and educate the officials to confront the widespread abuse of controlled substances in the communities in which the officials work.

children.heading: Operation
children.label: b Operation
children.text: The regional training program established under subsection (a) shall be conducted within 12 months after , by a national training unit established by the Secretary.November 18, 1988
